title: tdd codex-judge pre-freeze spec-adversary verdict
description: Structured verdict from the independent cross-model verifier reviewing the frozen-candidate spec BEFORE the blind tracks run. Passed to `codex exec --output-schema`.

verdict.description: pass = spec is unambiguous and complete enough to freeze. concerns = at least one gap that two blind tracks would faithfully inherit.

kind.description: under-specified = readable two ways; spec-gap = silent on a needed behavior; safety = a harm path the spec doesn't close; unconstrained-format = a format that accepts garbage; validation-realism = rejects likely real input or accepts obvious garbage; interface-quality = type/nullability/naming weakness that will reach the code.

where.description: Spec section / behavior / field the finding concerns.

detail.description: The gap and the concrete failure it would cause downstream (e.g. 'allergen keys compared raw -> Peanuts vs peanut leaks').
